emails.subject: Jan '01
emails.body: Jan '01 Daren there is flow at meter 1386 for Jan 1-3. The average flow is 828/day. The last deal associated with this meter is 150325, Dec. 1-4, 2000. The counterparty is Hampshire. Could you please look at this and let me know if you put a deal in for these days? Thanks. AL

emails.subject: Re: Jan '01
emails.body: Re: Jan '01 I rolled deal 150325 for the first 3 days of Jan. I expect this point to be zero for the rest of Jan. D Aimee Lannou 01/05/2001 10:41 AM
